hero.subtitle: NovaNexus is a neutral hub for buyers and suppliers working on real production lines, automation, and precision manufacturing – focused on capability depth, structured RFQs, and less noise on both sides.

who.title: Built around the people running the work.
who.subtitle: Whether you manage operations, engineering, or sales, the platform should feel like a map – not just another directory.

buyers.title: For buyers
buyers.body: When you need a real factory or integrator for production lines, not just a generic contact list.
bullets: Guided RFQ intake that reduces back-and-forth

suppliers.title: For suppliers
suppliers.body: For factories, system integrators, and automation teams that want qualified work, not random one-off requests.
bullets: Profiles built around processes and materials
RFQs pre-filtered by region and project scale
Context to price work without decoding vague emails

both.title: For both sides
both.body: A neutral layer that focuses on clarity, not noise – fewer mismatches, clearer requirements, and better decisions.
bullets: Shared vocabulary around processes and specs
Lightweight market signals on cost and capacity
Content that explains trade-offs in plain language

flow.title: How it works in practice.
flow.subtitle: High-level view; the dedicated page goes deeper. The focus is to keep the loop tight, technical, and clear.

steps.title: Describe the line or project
steps.body: Share a concise brief: process, materials, annual volume, region, and target timeline. Attach layouts, drawings, or photos you already have.

steps.title: RFQ is structured & matched
steps.body: The RFQ is cleaned up, checked for missing details, and routed to suppliers whose capabilities actually fit the scope – not just anyone nearby.

steps.title: Focused supplier conversations
steps.body: Shortlisted suppliers receive a structured package so they can respond with real numbers instead of guesswork and endless clarification emails.

supplierBench.title: What kind of work lives on NovaNexus?
supplierBench.subtitle: The directory leans toward full lines, automation, and ongoing production – not one-off prototypes. A few examples of where it’s strongest:

cards.title: Production lines & automation
cards.body: Extrusion lines, hot saws, racking systems, warehouse automation, and robotics where throughput and uptime matter.

cards.title: Precision manufacturing
cards.body: CNC, press & forming, and cleanroom lines for industries that need traceability, validation, and documentation.

cards.title: Regional coverage
cards.body: Operators across Korea, SE Asia, and selected regions in the U.S. and EU, for teams balancing cost, support, and risk.

supplierBench.note: Want a deeper dive? The suppliers page shows example industries, regions, minimum project sizes, and certifications.

final.title: Start with one project.
final.sub: Submit an RFQ, explore the supplier bench, or just use the content to clarify your options. Even if you’re only mapping what’s possible, you should leave with a clearer picture than when you arrived.

hero.title: Live RFQs across production lines, robotics, and automation.
hero.subtitle: Examples of real-world RFQs flowing through NovaNexus — CNC & press lines, industrial robotics, warehouse systems, clean-room and medical devices, and large-scale automation where engineering quality matters more than the lowest quote.
hero.sampleNotice: Representative sample projects by region — live RFQs will appear here automatically as they go live.

hero.title: Become a vetted NovaNexus supplier
hero.subtitle: We onboard a small number of serious factories in aluminum, racking and automation. Tell us who you are and what you build – we’ll follow up with drawings and RFQs that fit.
